tooltip.viewPageDisabled: Enter a page path first to view the protected page.

siteWide.title: Lock Entire Site
siteWide.enabledDesc: All pages are locked with a single password
siteWide.disabledDesc: When enabled, every page on your site requires a password
siteWide.passwordPlaceholder: Enter a password for the entire site
form.logoInfoSiteWide: Upload a logo for the site-wide lock screen.
form.logoInfoPage: Upload a logo to display above the password form on the lock screen.
form.customTitleInfo: Customize the heading shown on the lock screen. Leave empty for the default.
form.customSubtitleInfo: Customize the subtitle shown below the heading. Leave empty for the default.
form.customSubtitlePlaceholder: Enter the password to access this page.
form.bgImageInfo: Upload a background image for the lock screen. Replaces the default gradient.
form.bgOverlayInfo: Controls how dark the overlay on top of the background image is. Higher = darker.
style.title: Lock Screen Style
style.inputRadiusInfo: Roundness of the password input field corners (in pixels).
style.eyeToggleInfo: Allow visitors to toggle password visibility with an eye icon.
style.buttonRadiusInfo: Roundness of the Unlock button corners (in pixels).
form.protectPageSubtitle: Set up password protection for a page
form.pagePathInfo: Enter the page slug — the last part of the URL after your site name. For example if your page is yoursite.com/about-me, enter /about-me. Use / for the homepage.
form.pagePathInfoWix: Your site uses a Wix domain. The URL looks like username.wixsite.com/site-name/page. Enter only the part AFTER the site name — for example, if the full URL is {siteUrl}/about-me, enter /about-me. Do NOT include the site name. Use / for the homepage.
form.pagePathInfoCustom: Your site uses a custom domain. Enter the path after your domain — for example, if the page URL is {siteUrl}/about-me, enter /about-me. Use / for the homepage.
freePlan.limitMessage: Free plan allows 1 protected page. Upgrade for unlimited.
freePlan.premiumFeatureToast: This feature is available on the Premium plan. Upgrade to unlock it.
empty.addFirst: Add your first protected page above.

plan.premiumActive: You have Premium — unlimited pages, no watermark

moreApps.title: More apps by us
moreApps.frequentlyBoughtTogetherDesc: Show Frequently Bought Together in the Side Cart
moreApps.shippingAddressVerifierDesc: Protect your store from invalid orders
moreApps.productViewer360Desc: Interactive 360° product views that boost sales
moreApps.customAdditionalFeesDesc: Add custom fees to your store checkout
howToUse.title: How to Use
howToUse.subtitle: Protect any page in two simple steps
howToUse.step1Desc: Go to the Manage tab and use the form to enter the page path (e.g. /members-only). Set a password, configure remember visitor, and choose wrong password behavior.
howToUse.step2Desc: Save your configuration. The protection is applied automatically — no need to place any widgets. Visitors will see a lock screen on protected pages.
howToUse.howItWorksDesc: When you save a protected page, the app automatically injects a lock overlay on that page. The password is SHA-256 hashed and verified client-side for instant response — no server round-trip needed. No widget placement required.
tips.title: Tips & Best Practices
tips.strongPassword: Use a strong, unique password and share it only with intended visitors.
tips.pagePath: The page path must match your site URL exactly (e.g. /members-only). Use / for the homepage.
tips.rememberVisitor: Enable Remember Visitor so returning visitors don't need to re-enter the password every time.
tips.redirectUrl: Set a redirect URL to send visitors who enter the wrong password to another page instead of showing an error.
tips.logo: Upload a logo to display your brand on the lock screen for a professional look.
tips.premium: Premium users can protect unlimited pages and remove the watermark.
help.title: Need Help?
help.passwordNotWorkingDesc: Make sure you saved the page protection in the Manage tab. Changes are applied instantly after saving.
help.lockNotShowingDesc: Verify the page path matches your site URL exactly. The path is case-insensitive.
onboarding.welcome: Welcome to Password Protect Site Page
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Protect any page with a password. Set up protection right here in the dashboard — no widget placement needed.
onboarding.simpleSteps: Three simple steps to protect any page
onboarding.step1Desc: Enter the page path and set a password
onboarding.step2Desc: Click save — protection is applied instantly
onboarding.step3Desc: Share the password with intended visitors
onboarding.readyDesc: Add your first protected page or lock the entire site. Protection is applied instantly after saving.
dialog.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this protected page? This action cannot be undone.
